per_trial.operator_note: first registered run: daily trend ensemble BTC+ETH, full pre-holdout history
trial 2: risk pause thresholds aligned to research DD expectations (0.65/0.10); corrects trial 1 lockout
trial 3: 2x cost stress rerun of trial 2 config (gate stress evidence)
trial 4: audit-fix parity re-run (cost-adjusted sizing, rejected-count fix, turnover metric)
